case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JULIO CONTRERAS III et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS III, JULIO SONIA BELLIVIAU AKA SONIA BELLIVEAU DOES 1 TO 20, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SONIA BELLIVIAU AKA SONIA BELLIVEAU
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRERAS III, JULIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1418 C STRIPED BASS STREET, TREASURE ISLAND, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,547.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,547.50, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $54.50 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS III, JULIO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS III, JULIO
